message:
chore: expand .gitignore to cover agent-generated ephemeral files

Add broad patterns for root-level agent scratch output that accumulates
during multi-agent development sessions:
- *.log (build/test logs)
- /*.py (commit helpers, status checkers, diff runners)
- /*.txt (captured command output, status dumps)
- /*.json (scratch JSON output)

These files are generated by coding agents during work sessions and have
no value after the session ends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -153,3 +153,11 @@ unwraps*.txt
 
 # Root-level scratch source files
 /get_hash.rs
+
+# Root-level agent-generated scripts and scratch output
+# (commit helpers, status checkers, diff runners, log captures, etc.)
+*.log
+/*.py
+/*.txt
+/*.json
+!package.json
